context: Tests whether the agent creates a correctly-numbered ADR with the adr CLI and completes the house template with all required sections and a real rejected alternative.

checklist.name: Uses adr new for creation
checklist.description: Creates the record with `adr new "Adopt event-driven ingestion"` rather than hand-writing a file.

checklist.name: Correct next number
checklist.description: The new record is numbered 0002 (max existing 0001 plus one), not 0001 or a guessed number.

checklist.name: Kebab-case file name
checklist.description: The file is named 0002-adopt-event-driven-ingestion.md under docs/adr.

checklist.name: All template headings present and ordered
checklist.description: The ADR contains Context, Decision, Consequences (with Positive, Negative, Neutral), Alternatives Considered, and Compliance in that order.

checklist.name: Alternatives populated
checklist.description: At least one rejected alternative is recorded with pros, cons, and a concrete reason for rejection.

checklist.name: Status and date set correctly
checklist.description: The record carries a Status line and a YYYY-MM-DD Date; a freshly created record starts as Proposed.
